query: Build me a simple chatbot that helps users write emails
expected_behavior: Sets appropriate system prompt for email writing
Produces valid DSL YAML with version 0.6.0

query: I need a workflow that searches my knowledge base and summarizes the results
expected_behavior: Includes knowledge-retrieval node with placeholder dataset_ids
LLM node references knowledge retrieval output in context
Notes that dataset_ids need to be filled with actual IDs

query: Create a workflow that takes a list of URLs, fetches each one, and summarizes the content
expected_behavior: Uses workflow mode with start -> code (parse) -> iteration -> code (merge) -> end
Correctly wires iteration iterator_selector to the parsed list

query: Build a chatbot that can search the web and do calculations
expected_behavior: Uses advanced-chat mode or agent-chat mode
Includes agent node with google_search and calculator tools

query: Create a text summarization API endpoint
